title: deterministic Policy gate; Engine fires only on rule fall-through
engine_call: optional: judge an action no deterministic rule matched

title: picks the single next unit of work across the whole fleet
engine_call: optional: break a tie among top candidates

title: writes a test for one uncovered unit
engine_call: write a test for this one uncovered unit

title: digests Ledger + dev-ledger into a report
engine_call: none (optional prose summary)

title: ranks files relevant to an issue
engine_call: rank relevant files for this task

title: pushes ledger notifications; relays Policy ASK to a human over Telegram; captures my-idea from chat
engine_call: none directly — /idea delegates its one Engine call to MyIdea's own explore()

title: turns ship/fix ledger entries into a CHANGELOG.md section
engine_call: none

title: keeps the fleet's Project board + tracking issues synced to live repo state
engine_call: optional: rewrite this card's last/next-step summary

title: produces a priority-ordered, multi-item plan across the whole backlog
engine_call: required: propose a sequence, with rationale

title: discovers external sources live (web + arXiv), writes a cited study brief
engine_call: write a study brief from these discovered sources / order these researched topics

title: drafts content/design changes for a personal Jekyll site
engine_call: draft the Jekyll content for this request

title: keeps the fleet's technical-docs site in sync with each tool's README/CLAUDE.md
engine_call: write/update this tool's docs page from its README + seams

title: drafts and compiles a document as typeset Typst source + PDF
engine_call: draft the Typst source for this content request

title: drafts a slide-by-slide talk outline, then renders it via MyTypster
engine_call: draft the slide outline + speaker notes

title: decomposes a field of study into a curriculum, one issue per topic
engine_call: decompose this field into an ordered curriculum

title: discovers community libraries/CLIs for a task and recommends build-vs-buy
engine_call: recommend which discovered packages to use, with trade-offs

title: catalogs a personal book/materials collection into a unified index
engine_call: optional: assign a subject tag + blurb

title: explores a rough idea against the existing fleet and posts a structured brief
engine_call: required: explore this idea against this fleet

title: renders the org's one front-page dashboard
engine_call: optional: write the two-sentence state-of-the-fleet banner

title: curates a TODO.md (per-repo or org-wide roll-up) from open issues + the plan
engine_call: optional: prioritise issues into Now/Next/Later

title: given a URL + a question, fetches the page and extracts structured data
engine_call: extract structured data answering this question from this page's text

title: read-only HTTP server over the shared ledger
engine_call: none — deterministic

title: issue → diff → PR (the act tool)
engine_call: deferred: write the diff for this issue

title: flags correctness bugs on an open PR
engine_call: does this diff have a correctness bug?

title: labels/splits raw issues into ready units
engine_call: split/label this issue

title: bootstraps a new My[X] tool repo from a proposal
engine_call: expand a proposal into the four CLAUDE.md seams

title: answers what-happened/why from this project's own ledger history
engine_call: answer this question using only these ledger excerpts

title: keeps a repo's knowledge graph fresh for other tools to query
engine_call: none

title: answers domain questions from external literature
engine_call: answer this question using only these knowledge-graph excerpts

title: flags cross-repo convention drift
engine_call: none

title: recommends a course of action with trade-offs
engine_call: recommend an answer, with trade-offs

title: writes/improves a PR's title + description after it's opened
engine_call: write a PR title + description for this diff

title: teaches or quizzes on a topic already in MyKnowledger's corpus
engine_call: write a lesson / grade this answer

title: discovers current sources on a schedule and posts a dated digest
engine_call: write a digest from these newly discovered items

title: orders the fleet's open PRs into a dependency-safe merge sequence
engine_call: order these PRs into a coherent merge story, within the given constraints

title: the fleet's control plane: turns the operator's supervisory decision into an action, and explains the fleet's behaviour back to them
engine_call: explain why the fleet did this, from its ledger entries and the diff

title: applies one change to many repos, one PR each
engine_call: none — deterministic

title: scans every repo for leaked secrets and vulnerable dependencies
engine_call: optional: write a remediation summary from these redacted findings

title: discovers canonical citation metadata for a reference request and commits a normalized bibliography entry
engine_call: resolve a reference request to one canonical candidate, with a citation key

title: given a local CSV, deterministically profiles it and narrates insights + one follow-up analysis
engine_call: given a deterministic CSV profile, write a short narrative plus one concrete follow-up analysis

title: extracts tags/topics and a title from a freeform note filed as an issue
engine_call: extract 3-7 tags/topics and propose a title for this note

title: translates an animation concept into a syntax-valid ManimCE Scene script
engine_call: write one ManimCE Scene subclass for this animation concept

title: given a CSV time-series, computes an FFT power spectrum and narrates findings
engine_call: narrate FFT/stat findings and suggest one concrete follow-up action

title: given a local image, deterministically profiles it (dimensions/histogram/EXIF) and interprets findings
engine_call: interpret this deterministic image profile and suggest one concrete follow-up processing step

title: defines a term from a document corpus, citing the exact source spans
engine_call: define this term using only these excerpts, citing each claim inline

title: the fleet's front door for a non-technical newcomer: a plain-language catalog, wish matching, and a dry-run trial in a playground repo
engine_call: required: match a plain-language wish to the fleet catalog

title: pre-publish compliance gate: scans a repo/diff for secrets, personal info, and likely-copyrighted material before a public push
engine_call: optional: classify a deterministic finding as ok/review/block with a rationale
